summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard independently. No shared canonical was selected, no security-sensitive refs were detected, and no close/merge/fix actions are allowed by this job. Each open PR remains blocked on maintainer or author follow-up rather than automated mutation.

actions.reason: Focused ACP/auth-provider behavior change with current review findings; automation cannot merge, fix, or close it in this inventory job.
Proof label and passing proof check conflict; human review is needed before any close/merge path.
Green, focused behavior fix with a disputed review-bot finding; maintainer technical judgment is required.
Green focused session-state change; merge/fix are disallowed and maintainer review is required before any landing decision.
Large message-delivery behavior change needs maintainer technical review; this job cannot merge or repair it.
Whether to accept or close this low-signal docs addition is a maintainer decision; automated low-signal closeout is not allowed here.
Risky setup-script change with bot findings addressed by the author but still needing maintainer review; no merge/fix action is allowed.
The PR appears useful but proof is failing; maintainer or author follow-up is required before classification can advance beyond keep-open.
Green focused channel behavior fix; merge/fix are disallowed and maintainer review is required before landing.
Docs PR has an unresolved needs-changes review and waiting-on-author state; this inventory job cannot repair or close it.

needs_human: #90968: resolve ClawSweeper review findings before any ACP/auth-provider merge decision.

#78395: decide whether the author response resolves the alias-resolution Codex review concern.

#89287: maintainer technical review required for large P1 message-delivery diff.
#93239: maintainer decision required because low-signal docs closure is disabled and product/docs correctness is not automatable here.
#53920: maintainer review required for risky setup-script change after bot findings were reportedly addressed.
#55723: author or maintainer follow-up required because Real behavior proof is failing.
#89172: maintainer review required for green focused Feishu duration fix.
#89409: author or maintainer follow-up required because ClawSweeper says docs changes are still needed.
